records.m_Talk_ENG: Ms. Mi Rinae, this way!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ms. Mi Rinae, this way!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ms. Mi Rinae, this way!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll clear a path straight to that tree C.O.!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll clear a path straight to that tree C.O.!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll clear a path straight to that tree C.O.!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks, Robin!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks, Robin!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks, Robin!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's been ages since I last used this technique...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's been ages since I last used this technique...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's been ages since I last used this technique...

records.m_Talk_ENG: This cool, heavy sensation... it's like I'm back to being Swordmasterj[Mi Rinae again...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: This cool, heavy sensation... it's like I'm back to being Swordmasterj[Mi Rinae again...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: This cool, heavy sensation... it's like I'm back to being Swordmasterj[Mi Rinae again...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come on out, Boraemon! Give me collection No. 224! The Master Sword...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come on out, Boraemon! Give me collection No. 224! The Master Sword...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come on out, Boraemon! Give me collection No. 224! The Master Sword...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Call me that again and I won't send it. We're adults now, Rinae.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Call me that again and I won't send it. We're adults now, Rinae.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Call me that again and I won't send it. We're adults now, Rinae.

Ultimate technique
8 8! Starlightj[Special 8
8 8
8!

8 8
8!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hahaha! Did you see that, Bora?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hahaha! Did you see that, Bora?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hahaha! Did you see that, Bora?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That was play of the game, wasn't it? Told you I've still got it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That was play of the game, wasn't it? Told you I've still got it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That was play of the game, wasn't it? Told you I've still got it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I croak, play that at my funeral...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I croak, play that at my funeral...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I croak, play that at my funeral...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Look out, Ms. Mi Rinae!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Look out, Ms. Mi Rinae!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Look out, Ms. Mi Rinae!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you all right?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you all right?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you all right?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahaha... That almost really did me in, huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahaha... That almost really did me in, huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahaha... That almost really did me in, huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks a ton, Robin!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks a ton, Robin!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks a ton, Robin!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-I'm just glad I could help.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-I'm just glad I could help.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-I'm just glad I could help.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, impossible...! The Sacred Tree fell so easily...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, impossible...! The Sacred Tree fell so easily...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, impossible...! The Sacred Tree fell so easily...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Sacred Tree? You mean <color=#ffd34c>this thing</color>?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Sacred Tree? You mean <color=#ffd34c>this thing</color>?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Sacred Tree? You mean <color=#ffd34c>this thing</color>?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, what a disgusting-looking mask. It's so gross!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, what a disgusting-looking mask. It's so gross!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, what a disgusting-looking mask. It's so gross!

records.m_Talk_ENG: How dare you...?! Such blasphemy...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: How dare you...?! Such blasphemy...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: How dare you...?! Such blasphemy...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: All disciples, hear me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: All disciples, hear me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: All disciples, hear me!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Deliver the Sacred Tree's judgment upon those foo
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Deliver the Sacred Tree's judgment upon those foo
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Deliver the Sacred Tree's judgment upon those foo
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-the bishop's head just...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-the bishop's head just...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-the bishop's head just...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The lord of the forest is enraged! <color=#ffd34c>Yum Kaax</color> has appeared...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The lord of the forest is enraged! <color=#ffd34c>Yum Kaax</color> has appeared...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The lord of the forest is enraged! <color=#ffd34c>Yum Kaax</color> has appeared...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ms. Mi Rinae, something's wrong.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ms. Mi Rinae, something's wrong.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ms. Mi Rinae, something's wrong.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All the cultists are suddenly retreating.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All the cultists are suddenly retreating.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All the cultists are suddenly retreating.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Look there, Robin. What in the world is that...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Look there, Robin. What in the world is that...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Look there, Robin. What in the world is that...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Feels like we poked the wrong nest... I've got a bad feelin' about this...
